title: Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri
tagline: Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: The Erakeswara Temple (Telugu: ఎఱకేశ్వర దేవాలయం) is a Hindu Saivite temple located in the western side of Pillalamarri, in the Suryapet district, of Telangana, India.
overview.description: The Erakeswara Temple (Telugu: ఎఱకేశ్వర దేవాలయం) is a Hindu Saivite temple located in the western side of Pillalamarri, in the Suryapet district, of Telangana, India. The temple was built on the banks of the Musi river in c. 1208 CE. It was commissioned by Erakasani, the wife of Bēti Reddi of the Recherla family, who were feudatories of Kakatiyas. The Erakeswara Temple is one among the four prominent and intricately carved stone and granite temples located in Pillalamarri—the other three are about 250 metres east of the Erakeswara temple. topPlaces.name: Nameswara Temple, Pillalamarri
topPlaces.description: Nameswara Temple, also known as Parvati Mahadeva Nameswara temple, is a Saivite Hindu temple located in Pillalamarri, Suryapet district of Telangana, India. It is a double temple, with the Trikuteswara Temple aligned in parallel to it on the immediate north.

topPlaces.name: Balemla
topPlaces.description: Balemla is a village situated in Suryapet district of Telangana, India. It is located 10 km from district headquarters Suryapet.

topPlaces.name: Kalluru revenue division
topPlaces.description: Kalluru revenue division (or Kalluru division) is an administrative division in the Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is one of the 2 revenue divisions in the district which consists of 6 mandals under its administration.

topPlaces.name: Suryapet revenue division
topPlaces.description: Suryapet revenue division (or Suryapet division) is an administrative division in the Suryapet district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is one of the 3 revenue divisions in the district which consists of 11 mandals under its administration.

topPlaces.name: Nalgonda revenue division
topPlaces.description: Nalgonda revenue division (or Nalgonda division) is an administrative division in the Nalgonda district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is one of the 4 revenue divisions in the district which consists of 9mandals under its administration.

topPlaces.name: Suryapet
topPlaces.description: Suryapet, also natively spelt as Suryapeta, is a city in the Indian state of Telangana. It is a municipality and the headquarters of its eponymous district.In 2015, the Government of India placed Suryapet under the Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation scheme.

topPlaces.name: Suryapet (mandal)
topPlaces.description: Suryapet mandal is one of the 23 mandals in Suryapet district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is under the administration of Suryapet revenue division with its headquarters at Suryapet.

topPlaces.name: Khammam revenue division
topPlaces.description: Khammam revenue division (or Khammam division) is an administrative division in the Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is one of the 2 revenue divisions in the district which consists of 14 mandals under its administration.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (118 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri?
faq.a: Stays in Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Erakeswara Temple, Pillalamarri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nameswara Temple, Pillalamarri, Balemla, Kalluru revenue division, Suryapet revenue division, Nalgonda revenue division.
